nodes.name: Cyanomitra
nodes.summary: Cyanomitra（Cyanomitra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Green-headed sunbird、Bannerman's sunbird、Blue-throated brown sunbird等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-headed sunbird
nodes.summary: Green-headed sunbird（Cyanomitra verticalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Green-headed sunbird。

nodes.name: Green-headed sunbird
nodes.summary: The green-headed sunbird (Cyanomitra verticalis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Angola, Benin, Burkina Faso, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Kenya, Liberia, Malawi, Mali, Nigeria, Rwanda, Senegal, Sierra Leone, South Sudan, Tanzania, Togo, Uganda, and Zambia. References
